revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-3-355

A colourless hydrocarbon fuel C3H8, which is a gas at ordinary temperatures and atmospheric pressure. It has a boiling point of - 45 degrees C at atmospheric pressure.

{{IALAFooter}}
